name: Sash
description: Translucent silk ribbons laid diagonally across the dark — they slide, widen and flip their slant with every redraw.

code.style: --silk: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4)); --sy: @rand(8%, 66%); --sh: @rand(10%, 34%); --tilt: @p(-45deg, 45deg); --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: -30%; width: 160%; top: var(--sy); height: var(--sh); background: var(--silk); transform: rotate(var(--tilt)); opacity: 0.8; border-radius: 99px; transition: ease 600ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
